---
title: "Exploring Storms"
author: "sreeneshe"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidyverse))
```

## Named Storms Per Year

Below is a visualization showing the annual number of named storms tracked in the NOAA Atlantic hurricane database (HURDAT).

```{r}
#| label: plot-storms
#| fig-cap: "Annual frequency of storm types in the Atlantic Ocean (1975-2024)."
#| warning: false
#| message: false

storms |>
  filter(status %in% c("tropical depression", "tropical storm", "hurricane")) |>
  mutate(status = factor(status, levels = c("tropical depression", "tropical storm", "hurricane"))) |>
  group_by(year, status) |>
  summarise(n_storms = n_distinct(name), .groups = "drop") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = n_storms, fill = status)) +
  geom_area(alpha = 0.8, color = "white", linewidth = 0.2, position = position_stack(reverse = TRUE)) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "tropical depression" = "#8bc0e0",
      "tropical storm" = "#f39c12",
      "hurricane" = "#a93226"
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Annual Storm Frequency in the Atlantic by Type",
    subtitle = "Number of unique storms classified by status per year (1975-2024)",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Storm Count",
    fill = "Storm Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_family = "sans") +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16, color = "#2c3e50", margin = margin(b = 6)),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, color = "#7f8c8d", margin = margin(b = 15)),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11, color = "#2c3e50"),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "#34495e"),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10, color = "#2c3e50"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9, color = "#34495e"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "#f0f3f4"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(20, 20, 20, 20)
  )
```
